22 // Token: 0x060030E8 RID: 12520 RVA: 0x005BE5AC File Offset: 0x005BC7AC
23 public static void RequestParticleSpawn(bool clientOnly, ParticleOrchestraType type, ParticleOrchestraSettings settings, int? overrideInvokingPlayerIndex = null)
24 {
25 settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis = (byte)Main.myPlayer;
26 if (overrideInvokingPlayerIndex != null)
27 {
28 settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis = (byte)overrideInvokingPlayerIndex.Value;
29 }
30 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnParticlesDirect(type, settings);
31 if (!clientOnly && Main.netMode == 1)
32 {
33 NetManager.Instance.SendToServer(NetParticlesModule.Serialize(type, settings));
34 }
35 }
36
37 // Token: 0x060030E9 RID: 12521 RVA: 0x005BE601 File Offset: 0x005BC801
38 public static void BroadcastParticleSpawn(ParticleOrchestraType type, ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
39 {
40 settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis = (byte)Main.myPlayer;
41 if (!Main.dedServ)
42 {
43 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnParticlesDirect(type, settings);
44 return;
45 }
46 NetManager.Instance.Broadcast(NetParticlesModule.Serialize(type, settings), -1);
47 }
48
49 // Token: 0x060030EA RID: 12522 RVA: 0x005BE631 File Offset: 0x005BC831
50 public static void BroadcastOrRequestParticleSpawn(ParticleOrchestraType type, ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
51 {
52 settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis = (byte)Main.myPlayer;
53 if (!Main.dedServ)
54 {
55 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnParticlesDirect(type, settings);
56 }
57 if (Main.netMode != 0)
58 {
59 NetManager.Instance.SendToServerOrBroadcast(NetParticlesModule.Serialize(type, settings));
60 }
61 }

149 {

151 {

154 switch (type)
155 {
156 case ParticleOrchestraType.Keybrand:

368 // Token: 0x060030FA RID: 12538 RVA: 0x005BE9D8 File Offset: 0x005BCBD8
369 private static void Spawn_PaladinsHammerShockwave(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
370 {
371 Vector2 positionInWorld = settings.PositionInWorld;
372 int num = (int)settings.MovementVector.X;
373 int num2 = (int)settings.MovementVector.Y;
374 Vector2 vector = positionInWorld + new Vector2((float)num * 0.5f, (float)num2 * 0.5f);
375 SoundEngine.PlaySound(SoundID.Item180, vector, 0f, 1f);
376 for (int i = 0; i < 200; i++)
377 {
378 if (Main.rand.Next(2) == 0)
379 {
380 int num3 = Dust.NewDust(positionInWorld, num, num2, 57, 0f, 0f, 200, default(Color), 1.2f);
381 Main.dust[num3].velocity = Main.dust[num3].position - vector;
382 Main.dust[num3].velocity.Normalize();
383 Main.dust[num3].velocity *= 9.5f;
384 Main.dust[num3].noGravity = true;
385 }
386 if (Main.rand.Next(3) == 0)
387 {
388 int num4 = Dust.NewDust(positionInWorld, num, num2, 43, 0f, 0f, 254, default(Color), 0.3f);
389 Main.dust[num4].velocity = Main.dust[num4].position - vector;
390 Main.dust[num4].velocity.Normalize();
391 Main.dust[num4].velocity *= 9.5f;
392 Main.dust[num4].noGravity = true;
393 }
394 }
395 }
396
397 // Token: 0x060030FB RID: 12539 RVA: 0x005BEB80 File Offset: 0x005BCD80
398 private static void Spawn_InScreenDungeonSpawn(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
399 {
400 Vector2 movementVector = settings.MovementVector;
401 Vector2 positionInWorld = settings.PositionInWorld;
402 int uniqueInfoPiece = settings.UniqueInfoPiece;
403 Vector2 vector = positionInWorld + new Vector2(-0.5f, -1f) * movementVector;
404 int num = Main.rand.Next(2, 5);
405 for (int i = 0; i < num; i++)
406 {
407 Gore gore = Gore.NewGorePerfect(vector + new Vector2(-16f, -16f) + movementVector * new Vector2(Main.rand.NextFloat(), 0.5f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.5f), Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(2f, 2f), Main.rand.Next(61, 64), 1f);
408 gore.scale *= 1f;
409 gore.position -= gore.velocity * 5f;
410 }
411 SoundEngine.PlaySound(ContentSamples.NpcsByNetId[uniqueInfoPiece].HitSound, (int)settings.PositionInWorld.X, (int)settings.PositionInWorld.Y, 0f, 1f);
412 }
413
414 // Token: 0x060030FC RID: 12540 RVA: 0x005BECC0 File Offset: 0x005BCEC0
415 private static void Spawn_HeroicisSetSpawnSound(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
416 {
417 SoundEngine.PlaySound(SoundID.RainbowBoulder, (int)settings.PositionInWorld.X, (int)settings.PositionInWorld.Y, 0f, 1f);
418 }

420 // Token: 0x060030FD RID: 12541 RVA: 0x005BECF0 File Offset: 0x005BCEF0
421 private static void Spawn_PaladinsShieldHit(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
422 {
423 Main.instance.LoadItem(938);
424 Asset<Texture2D> asset = TextureAssets.Item[938];
425 if (!asset.IsLoaded)
426 {
427 return;
428 }
429 Vector2 positionInWorld = settings.PositionInWorld;
430 int num = (int)positionInWorld.X;
431 int num2 = (int)positionInWorld.Y;
432 Vector2 vector = Vector2.Zero;
433 if (Main.player.IndexInRange(num))
434 {
435 Player player = Main.player[num];
436 vector = player.MountedCenter;
437 FadingParticle fadingParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolFading.RequestParticle();
438 int num3 = 30;
439 fadingParticle.followPlayerIndex = num;
440 fadingParticle.ColorTint = new Color(255, 255, 255, 220) * 0.85f;
441 fadingParticle.SetBasicInfo(asset, null, Vector2.Zero, Vector2.Zero);
442 fadingParticle.SetTypeInfo((float)num3, true);
443 fadingParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.1f;
444 fadingParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.1f;
445 fadingParticle.Scale = new Vector2(1f, 1f) * 0.65f;
446 fadingParticle.ScaleVelocity = new Vector2(2f, 2f) / (float)num3;
447 fadingParticle.ScaleAcceleration = -fadingParticle.ScaleVelocity / (float)num3;
448 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(fadingParticle);
449 for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
450 {
451 Dust dust = Dust.NewDustDirect(player.position, player.width, player.height, 57, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1f);
452 dust.velocity *= 3f;
453 dust.noGravity = true;
454 dust.scale = 1f;
455 dust.fadeIn = 1.5f;
456 dust.noLight = true;
457 }
458 }
459 if (Main.player.IndexInRange(num2))
460 {
461 Player player2 = Main.player[num2];
462 FadingParticle fadingParticle2 = ParticleOrchestrator._poolFading.RequestParticle();
463 float num4 = 15f;
464 fadingParticle2.followPlayerIndex = num;
465 fadingParticle2.ColorTint = new Color(255, 255, 255, 127) * 0.75f;
466 fadingParticle2.SetBasicInfo(asset, null, Vector2.Zero, Vector2.Zero);
467 fadingParticle2.SetTypeInfo(num4, true);
468 fadingParticle2.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.1f;
469 fadingParticle2.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.1f;
470 fadingParticle2.Scale = new Vector2(1f, 1f) * 0.65f;
471 fadingParticle2.ScaleVelocity = new Vector2(2f, 2f) / num4;
472 fadingParticle2.ScaleAcceleration = -fadingParticle2.ScaleVelocity / num4;
473 Vector2 vector2 = vector - player2.MountedCenter;
474 fadingParticle2.LocalPosition = -vector2;
475 if (num == -1)
476 {
477 fadingParticle2.LocalPosition = player2.MountedCenter;
478 }
479 fadingParticle2.Velocity = vector2 * 0.5f / num4;
480 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(fadingParticle2);
481 for (int j = 0; j < 4; j++)
482 {
483 Dust dust2 = Dust.NewDustDirect(player2.position, player2.width, player2.height, 57, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1f);
484 dust2.velocity *= 3f;
485 dust2.noGravity = true;
486 dust2.scale = 1f;
487 dust2.fadeIn = 1.5f;
488 dust2.noLight = true;
489 }
490 }
491 }
492
493 // Token: 0x060030FE RID: 12542 RVA: 0x005BF088 File Offset: 0x005BD288
494 private static void Spawn_StormLightningWindup(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
495 {
496 float num = Main.rand.NextFloat() * 6.2831855f;
497 float num2 = (float)Main.rand.Next(1, 3);
498 float num3 = 0.7f;
499 short num4 = 916;
500 Main.instance.LoadProjectile((int)num4);
501 Color white = Color.White;
502 if (settings.UniqueInfoPiece != 0)
503 {
504 white.PackedValue = (uint)settings.UniqueInfoPiece;
505 }
506 white.A = 0;
507 for (float num5 = 0f; num5 < 1f; num5 += 1f / num2)
508 {
509 int num6 = Main.rand.Next(7, 11);
510 float num7 = 6.2831855f * num5 + num + Main.rand.NextFloatDirection() * 0.25f;
511 float num8 = Main.rand.NextFloat() * 3f + 0.1f;
512 Vector2 vector = Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(6f, 6f) * num3;
513 Color color = white;
514 RandomizedFrameParticle randomizedFrameParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolRandomizedFrame.RequestParticle();
515 randomizedFrameParticle.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Projectile[(int)num4], null, Vector2.Zero, vector);
516 randomizedFrameParticle.SetTypeInfo(Main.projFrames[(int)num4], 2, (float)num6);
517 randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity = num7.ToRotationVector2() * num8 * new Vector2(1f, 0.5f) + settings.MovementVector * 0.5f;
518 randomizedFrameParticle.ColorTint = color;
519 randomizedFrameParticle.LocalPosition = settings.PositionInWorld + vector;
520 randomizedFrameParticle.Rotation = randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity.ToRotation();
521 randomizedFrameParticle.Scale = new Vector2(1.5f, 0.75f) * 1f;
522 randomizedFrameParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 1f;
523 randomizedFrameParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.9f;
524 randomizedFrameParticle.ScaleVelocity = new Vector2(0.025f);
525 if (Main.rand.Next(3) == 0)
526 {
527 randomizedFrameParticle.LocalPosition += randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity * (float)(num6 - 1);
528 randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity *= -0.5f;
529 }
530 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(randomizedFrameParticle);
531 RandomizedFrameParticle randomizedFrameParticle2 = ParticleOrchestrator._poolRandomizedFrame.RequestParticle();
532 randomizedFrameParticle2.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Projectile[(int)num4], null, Vector2.Zero, vector);
533 randomizedFrameParticle2.SetTypeInfo(Main.projFrames[(int)num4], 2, (float)num6);
534 randomizedFrameParticle2.Velocity = randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity;
535 randomizedFrameParticle2.ColorTint = new Color(255, 255, 255, 0);
536 randomizedFrameParticle2.LocalPosition = randomizedFrameParticle.LocalPosition;
537 randomizedFrameParticle2.Rotation = randomizedFrameParticle.Rotation;
538 randomizedFrameParticle2.Scale = randomizedFrameParticle.Scale * 0.5f;
539 randomizedFrameParticle2.FadeInNormalizedTime = randomizedFrameParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime;
540 randomizedFrameParticle2.FadeOutNormalizedTime = randomizedFrameParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime;
541 randomizedFrameParticle2.ScaleVelocity = randomizedFrameParticle.ScaleVelocity * 0.5f;
542 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(randomizedFrameParticle2);
543 }
544 }

546 // Token: 0x060030FF RID: 12543 RVA: 0x005BF39C File Offset: 0x005BD59C
547 private static void Spawn_StormLightning(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
548 {
549 StormLightningParticle stormLightningParticle = ParticleOrchestrator.StormLightningParticles.RequestParticle();
550 Color white = Color.White;
551 if (settings.UniqueInfoPiece != 0)
552 {
553 white.PackedValue = (uint)settings.UniqueInfoPiece;
554 }
555 int num = 45;
556 int num2 = (int)settings.MovementVector.X;
557 stormLightningParticle.Prepare((uint)num2, settings.PositionInWorld, num, white);
558 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(stormLightningParticle);
559 settings.PositionInWorld = stormLightningParticle.EndPosition;
560 PunchCameraModifier punchCameraModifier = new PunchCameraModifier(settings.PositionInWorld, (Main.rand.NextFloat() * 6.2831855f).ToRotationVector2() * new Vector2(0.5f, 1f), MathHelper.Lerp(2f, 10f, Main.SceneState.outsideWeatherEffectIntensity), 3f, 45, 1500f, "StormLightning");
561 Main.instance.CameraModifiers.Add(punchCameraModifier);
562 Main.NewLightning(true, true);
563 SoundEngine.PlaySound(SoundID.InstantThunder, settings.PositionInWorld, 0f, MathHelper.Lerp(0.4f, 1f, Main.SceneState.outsideWeatherEffectIntensity));
564 Lighting.AddLight(settings.PositionInWorld, (float)white.R / 255f, (float)white.G / 255f, (float)white.B / 255f);
565 int num3 = 3;
566 Point point = settings.PositionInWorld.ToTileCoordinates();
567 for (int i = point.X - 1; i <= point.X + 1; i++)
568 {
569 for (int j = point.Y - 1; j <= point.Y + 1; j++)
570 {
571 Tile tileSafely = Framing.GetTileSafely(i, j);
572 if (tileSafely.active())
573 {
574 int num4 = WorldGen.KillTile_GetTileDustAmount(true, tileSafely);
575 for (int k = 0; k < num4; k++)
576 {
577 Dust dust = Main.dust[WorldGen.KillTile_MakeTileDust(i, j, tileSafely)];
578 dust.velocity.Y = dust.velocity.Y - (3f + (float)num3 * 1.5f);
579 dust.velocity.Y = dust.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
580 dust.velocity.Y = dust.velocity.Y * 0.75f;
581 dust.scale += (float)num3 * 0.03f;
582 }
583 for (int l = 0; l < num4 - 1; l++)
584 {
585 Dust dust2 = Main.dust[WorldGen.KillTile_MakeTileDust(i, j, tileSafely)];
586 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y - (1f + (float)num3);
587 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
588 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y * 0.75f;
589 }
590 if (tileSafely.type == 5)
591 {
592 for (int m = 0; m < 6; m++)
593 {
594 Dust dust3 = Dust.NewDustDirect(new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16)), 16, 16, 6, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1f);
595 dust3.velocity *= 2f;
596 dust3.fadeIn += Main.rand.NextFloat();
597 dust3.noLightEmittance = true;
598 }
599 for (int n = 0; n < 3; n++)
600 {
601 Dust dust4 = Dust.NewDustDirect(new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16)), 16, 16, 31, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1f);
602 dust4.velocity *= 3f;
603 dust4.noGravity = true;
604 dust4.fadeIn += 1f + Main.rand.NextFloat();
605 }
606 }
607 }
608 }
609 }
610 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnLightningExplosionDust(settings.PositionInWorld, white);
611 for (int num5 = 0; num5 < 4; num5++)
612 {
613 Gore.NewGoreDirect(settings.PositionInWorld + Utils.RandomVector2(Main.rand, -15f, 15f) * new Vector2(0.5f, 1f) + new Vector2(-20f, 0f), Vector2.Zero, 61 + Main.rand.Next(3), 1f).velocity *= 0.5f;
614 }
615 Vector2 vector = new Vector2(1.1f);
616 Vector2 vector2 = new Vector2(-0.9f);
617 short num6 = 1091;
618 Main.instance.LoadProjectile((int)num6);
619 FadingParticle fadingParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolFading.RequestParticle();
620 fadingParticle.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Projectile[(int)num6], null, Vector2.Zero, settings.PositionInWorld);
621 fadingParticle.SetTypeInfo((float)num, true);
622 fadingParticle.ColorTint = white;
623 fadingParticle.ColorTint.A = 0;
624 fadingParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.01f;
625 fadingParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.6f;
626 fadingParticle.Scale = vector;
627 fadingParticle.ScaleVelocity = vector2 / (float)num;
628 fadingParticle.ScaleAcceleration = fadingParticle.ScaleVelocity * (-1f / (float)num);
629 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(fadingParticle);
630 FadingParticle fadingParticle2 = ParticleOrchestrator._poolFading.RequestParticle();
631 fadingParticle2.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Projectile[(int)num6], null, Vector2.Zero, settings.PositionInWorld);
632 fadingParticle2.SetTypeInfo((float)num, true);
633 fadingParticle2.ColorTint = new Color(255, 255, 255);
634 fadingParticle2.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.01f;
635 fadingParticle2.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.6f;
636 fadingParticle2.Scale = vector * 0.7f;
637 fadingParticle2.ScaleVelocity = vector2 * 0.7f / (float)num;
638 fadingParticle2.ScaleAcceleration = fadingParticle2.ScaleVelocity * (-1f / (float)num);
639 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(fadingParticle2);
640 float num7 = 12f;
641 num6 = 916;
642 Main.instance.LoadProjectile((int)num6);
643 for (float num8 = 0f; num8 < 1f; num8 += 1f / num7)
644 {
645 int num9 = Main.rand.Next(14, 22);
646 Vector2 vector3 = Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(6f, 6f) * 0.7f;
647 Color color = white;
648 RandomizedFrameParticle randomizedFrameParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolRandomizedFrame.RequestParticle();
649 randomizedFrameParticle.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Projectile[(int)num6], null, Vector2.Zero, vector3);
650 randomizedFrameParticle.SetTypeInfo(Main.projFrames[(int)num6], 3, (float)num9);
651 randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity = Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(6f, 3f);
652 randomizedFrameParticle.ColorTint = color;
653 randomizedFrameParticle.LocalPosition = settings.PositionInWorld + vector3;
654 randomizedFrameParticle.Rotation = randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity.ToRotation();
655 randomizedFrameParticle.Scale = new Vector2(1.5f, 0.75f) * 0.85f;
656 randomizedFrameParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.01f;
657 randomizedFrameParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0f;
658 randomizedFrameParticle.ScaleVelocity = new Vector2(0.025f);
659 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(randomizedFrameParticle);
660 RandomizedFrameParticle randomizedFrameParticle2 = ParticleOrchestrator._poolRandomizedFrame.RequestParticle();
661 randomizedFrameParticle2.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Projectile[(int)num6], null, Vector2.Zero, vector3);
662 randomizedFrameParticle2.SetTypeInfo(Main.projFrames[(int)num6], 3, (float)num9);
663 randomizedFrameParticle2.Velocity = randomizedFrameParticle.Velocity;
664 randomizedFrameParticle2.ColorTint = new Color(255, 255, 255, 0);
665 randomizedFrameParticle2.LocalPosition = randomizedFrameParticle.LocalPosition;
666 randomizedFrameParticle2.Rotation = randomizedFrameParticle.Rotation;
667 randomizedFrameParticle2.Scale = randomizedFrameParticle.Scale * 0.5f;
668 randomizedFrameParticle2.FadeInNormalizedTime = randomizedFrameParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime;
669 randomizedFrameParticle2.FadeOutNormalizedTime = randomizedFrameParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime;
670 randomizedFrameParticle2.ScaleVelocity = randomizedFrameParticle.ScaleVelocity * 0.5f;
671 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(randomizedFrameParticle2);
672 }
673 }
674
675 // Token: 0x06003100 RID: 12544 RVA: 0x005BFBA8 File Offset: 0x005BDDA8
676 public static void SpawnLightningExplosionDust(Vector2 position, Color customColor)
677 {
678 for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++)
679 {
680 Dust dust = Dust.NewDustPerfect(position, 226, null, 0, default(Color), 1f);
681 dust.HackFrame(278);
682 dust.color = customColor;
683 dust.customData = dust.color;
684 dust.velocity *= 1f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 2.5f;
685 dust.velocity += new Vector2(0f, -2f);
686 dust.fadeIn = 0f;
687 dust.scale = 0.4f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.5f;
688 Dust dust2 = dust;
689 dust2.velocity.X = dust2.velocity.X * 2f;
690 dust.position -= dust.velocity * 3f;
691 }
692 for (int j = 0; j < 6; j++)
693 {
694 Dust dust3 = Dust.NewDustPerfect(position, 226, null, 0, default(Color), 1f);
695 dust3.HackFrame(278);
696 dust3.color = customColor;
697 dust3.customData = dust3.color;
698 dust3.velocity *= 1f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 2.5f;
699 dust3.velocity += new Vector2(0f, -2f);
700 dust3.fadeIn = 1.7f + (float)Main.rand.Next() * 1f;
701 dust3.noGravity = true;
702 dust3.scale = 0.4f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.5f;
703 Dust dust4 = dust3;
704 dust4.velocity.X = dust4.velocity.X * 2f;
705 dust3.velocity *= 0.6f;
706 dust3.position -= dust3.velocity * 3f;
707 }
708 for (int k = 0; k < 6; k++)
709 {
710 Dust dust5 = Dust.NewDustPerfect(position + Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(20f, 20f), 226, null, 0, default(Color), 1f);
711 dust5.HackFrame(278);
712 dust5.color = customColor;
713 dust5.customData = dust5.color;
714 dust5.velocity = new Vector2(0f, -1f).RotatedByRandom(0.7853981852531433);
715 dust5.velocity *= 3f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 6.5f;
716 dust5.fadeIn = 0f;
717 dust5.scale = 0.4f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.5f;
718 dust5.noGravity = true;
719 dust5.position -= dust5.velocity * 2f;
720 }
721 for (int l = 0; l < 6; l++)
722 {
723 Dust dust6 = Dust.NewDustPerfect(position, 306, new Vector2?(new Vector2(0f, -4f).RotatedByRandom(1.5707963705062866)), 0, default(Color), 1f);
724 dust6.color = new Color((int)customColor.R, (int)customColor.G, (int)customColor.B, 0);
725 dust6.scale = 2.8f;
726 dust6.fadeIn = 0f;
727 dust6.noGravity = Main.rand.Next(3) != 0;
728 Dust dust7 = Dust.CloneDust(dust6);
729 dust7.color = new Color(255, 255, 255, 0);
730 dust7.scale = 1.9f;
731 }
732 for (int m = 0; m < 6; m++)
733 {
734 Dust dust8 = Dust.NewDustPerfect(position, 306, new Vector2?(new Vector2(0f, -2f).RotatedByRandom(1.5707963705062866)), 0, default(Color), 1f);
735 dust8.color = new Color((int)customColor.R, (int)customColor.G, (int)customColor.B, 0);
736 dust8.scale = 2.8f;
737 dust8.fadeIn = 0f;
738 dust8.noGravity = Main.rand.Next(3) != 0;
739 Dust dust9 = Dust.CloneDust(dust8);
740 dust9.color = new Color(255, 255, 255, 0);
741 dust9.scale = 1.9f;
742 }
743 for (int n = 0; n < 3; n++)
744 {
745 Dust dust10 = Dust.NewDustPerfect(position + Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(20f, 20f), 43, new Vector2?(Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(6f, 6f) * Main.rand.NextFloat()), 26, Color.Lerp(customColor, Color.White, Main.rand.NextFloat()), 1f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 1.4f);
746 dust10.fadeIn = 1.5f;
747 if (dust10.velocity.Y > 0f && Main.rand.Next(2) == 0)
748 {
749 Dust dust11 = dust10;
750 dust11.velocity.Y = dust11.velocity.Y * -1f;
751 }
752 dust10.noGravity = true;
753 }
754 }
755
756 // Token: 0x06003101 RID: 12545 RVA: 0x005C0170 File Offset: 0x005BE370
757 private static void Spawn_NatureFly(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
758 {
759 int num = ParticleOrchestrator._natureFlies.CountParticlesInUse();
760 if (num > 50 && Main.rand.NextFloat() >= Utils.Remap((float)num, 50f, 400f, 0.5f, 0f, true))
761 {
762 return;
763 }
764 LittleFlyingCritterParticle littleFlyingCritterParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._natureFlies.RequestParticle();
765 Color color = Main.hslToRgb(Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.14f, 0.1f + 0.6f * Main.rand.NextFloat(), 0.3f + 0.3f * Main.rand.NextFloat(), byte.MaxValue);
766 color.A = 170;
767 littleFlyingCritterParticle.Prepare(LittleFlyingCritterParticle.FlyType.RegularFly, settings.PositionInWorld, Main.rand.Next(180, 301), color, 1);
768 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(littleFlyingCritterParticle);
769 }
770
771 // Token: 0x06003102 RID: 12546 RVA: 0x005C0244 File Offset: 0x005BE444
772 private static void Spawn_LakeSparkle(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
773 {
774 FadingParticle fadingParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolFading.RequestParticle();
775 Vector2 vector = Vector2.UnitY * (-0.1f - 0.4f * Main.rand.NextFloat());
776 vector = settings.MovementVector / 60f;
777 fadingParticle.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Star[0], null, Vector2.Zero, settings.PositionInWorld);
778 float num = 50f + 90f * Main.rand.NextFloat();
779 fadingParticle.SetTypeInfo(num, true);
780 fadingParticle.AccelerationPerFrame = vector / num;
781 fadingParticle.ColorTint = new Color(255, 255, 255, 0) * Main.rand.NextFloat();
782 fadingParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.45f;
783 fadingParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.45f;
784 fadingParticle.Rotation = Main.rand.NextFloat() * 6.2831855f;
785 fadingParticle.RotationVelocity = Main.rand.NextFloatDirection() * 6.2831855f / 32f;
786 fadingParticle.RotationVelocity *= Utils.Clamp<float>(settings.MovementVector.Length() / 32f, 0f, 1f);
787 fadingParticle.Scale = Vector2.One * (0.5f + 0.5f * Main.rand.NextFloat());
788 Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Add(fadingParticle);
789 }

791 // Token: 0x06003103 RID: 12547 RVA: 0x005C03AC File Offset: 0x005BE5AC
792 private static void Spawn_FakeFish(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings, bool jumping = false)
793 {
794 FakeFishParticle fakeFishParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._fakeFish.RequestParticle();
795 Vector2 movementVector = settings.MovementVector;
796 int uniqueInfoPiece = settings.UniqueInfoPiece;
797 int num = Main.rand.Next(240, 421);
798 fakeFishParticle.Position = settings.PositionInWorld;
799 fakeFishParticle.Velocity = Vector2.Zero;
800 fakeFishParticle.Prepare(uniqueInfoPiece, num, movementVector);
801 if (jumping)
802 {
803 fakeFishParticle.Velocity = settings.MovementVector;
804 fakeFishParticle.TryJumping();
805 }
806 Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Add(fakeFishParticle);
807 }
808
809 // Token: 0x06003104 RID: 12548 RVA: 0x005C0428 File Offset: 0x005BE628
810 public static void MagnetFakeFish(Projectile proj, int searchedItemType)
811 {
812 using (IEnumerator<FakeFishParticle> enumerator = (from x in Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Particles.OfType<FakeFishParticle>()
813 orderby x.Position.Distance(proj.Center)
814 select x).GetEnumerator())
815 {
816 while (enumerator.MoveNext())
817 {
818 if (enumerator.Current.TryToMagnetizeTo(proj, searchedItemType))
819 {
820 return;
821 }
822 }
823 }
824 using (IEnumerator<FakeFishParticle> enumerator = (from x in Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Particles.OfType<FakeFishParticle>()
825 orderby x.Position.Distance(proj.Center)
826 select x).GetEnumerator())
827 {
828 while (enumerator.MoveNext())
829 {
830 if (enumerator.Current.TryToMagnetizeTo(proj, -1))
831 {
832 break;
833 }
834 }
835 }
836 }
837
838 // Token: 0x06003105 RID: 12549 RVA: 0x005C0504 File Offset: 0x005BE704
839 public static void PingFakeFish(Projectile proj, int searchedItemType)
840 {
841 foreach (FakeFishParticle fakeFishParticle in from x in Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Particles.OfType<FakeFishParticle>()
842 orderby x.Position.Distance(proj.Center)
843 select x)
844 {
845 fakeFishParticle.TryToBePinged(proj, searchedItemType);
846 }
847 }
848
849 // Token: 0x06003106 RID: 12550 RVA: 0x005C0580 File Offset: 0x005BE780
850 public static void PushAwayFakeFish(Projectile proj, int searchedItemType)
851 {
852 foreach (FakeFishParticle fakeFishParticle in from x in Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Particles.OfType<FakeFishParticle>()
853 orderby x.Position.Distance(proj.Center)
854 select x)
855 {
856 fakeFishParticle.TryToPushAway(proj, searchedItemType);
857 }
858 }
859
860 // Token: 0x06003107 RID: 12551 RVA: 0x005C05FC File Offset: 0x005BE7FC
861 public static void RepelAt(Vector2 position, float radius, bool wet)
862 {
863 ParticleRepelDetails particleRepelDetails = new ParticleRepelDetails
864 {
865 SourcePosition = position,
866 Radius = radius,
867 IsInWater = wet
868 };
869 foreach (IParticle particle in Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Particles)
870 {
871 IParticleRepel particleRepel = particle as IParticleRepel;
872 if (particleRepel != null)
873 {
874 particleRepel.BeRepelled(ref particleRepelDetails);
875 }
876 }
877 foreach (IParticle particle2 in Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Particles)
878 {
879 IParticleRepel particleRepel2 = particle2 as IParticleRepel;
880 if (particleRepel2 != null)
881 {
882 particleRepel2.BeRepelled(ref particleRepelDetails);
883 }
884 }
885 }
886

939 prettySparkleParticle.DrawVerticalAxis = false;
940 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(prettySparkleParticle);

967 {
968 Vector2 zero = Vector2.Zero;

972 float num6 = 1.5707964f;

985 prettySparkleParticle.ColorTint = Main.hslToRgb((num3 + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.33f) % 1f, 1f, 0.4f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.25f, byte.MaxValue);
986 prettySparkleParticle.ColorTint = Main.hslToRgb((num4 + num3) % 1f, 1f, 0.5f, byte.MaxValue);
987 prettySparkleParticle.ColorTint.A = byte.MaxValue;
988 prettySparkleParticle.LocalPosition = settings.PositionInWorld + vector3;
989 prettySparkleParticle.Rotation = num6;
990 prettySparkleParticle.Scale = vector;
991 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(prettySparkleParticle);
992 prettySparkleParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolPrettySparkle.RequestParticle();
993 prettySparkleParticle.Velocity = vector2 + zero;
994 prettySparkleParticle.AccelerationPerFrame = num5.ToRotationVector2() * -(vector2 / num7) - zero * 1f / num7;
995 prettySparkleParticle.ColorTint = new Color(255, 255, 255, 0);

1004 dust.noGravity = true;

1245 // Token: 0x0600310E RID: 12558 RVA: 0x005C1E94 File Offset: 0x005C0094
1246 private static void Spawn_DeadCellsFlint(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
1247 {
1248 Vector2 positionInWorld = settings.PositionInWorld;
1249 float num = settings.MovementVector.Y;
1250 if (num == 0f)
1251 {
1252 num = 1f;
1253 }
1254 float x = settings.MovementVector.X;
1255 bool flag = false;
1256 Point point = (positionInWorld + new Vector2(-x, -160f)).ToTileCoordinates();
1257 Point point2 = (positionInWorld + new Vector2(x, 160f)).ToTileCoordinates();
1258 int num2 = 3;
1259 point.X -= num2;
1260 point.Y -= num2;
1261 point2.X += num2;
1262 point2.Y += num2;
1263 int num3 = point.X / 2 + point2.X / 2;
1264 int num4 = (int)x / 2 + 8 * num2;
1265 float num5 = 0.12f;
1266 float num6 = 2f;
1267 float num7 = 3f;
1268 float num8 = 40f;
1269 int num9 = 3;
1270 for (int i = point.X; i <= point2.X; i++)
1271 {
1272 for (int j = point.Y; j <= point2.Y; j++)
1273 {
1274 if (Vector2.Distance(positionInWorld, new Vector2((float)(i * 16), (float)(j * 16))) <= (float)num4)
1275 {
1276 Tile tileSafely = Framing.GetTileSafely(i, j);
1277 if (tileSafely.active() && Main.tileSolid[(int)tileSafely.type] && !Main.tileSolidTop[(int)tileSafely.type] && !Main.tileFrameImportant[(int)tileSafely.type])
1278 {
1279 Tile tileSafely2 = Framing.GetTileSafely(i, j - 1);
1280 if (!tileSafely2.active() || !Main.tileSolid[(int)tileSafely2.type] || Main.tileSolidTop[(int)tileSafely2.type])
1281 {
1282 flag = true;
1283 if (i > point.X + num2 || i < point.X - num2 || j > point.Y + num2 || j < point2.Y - num2)
1284 {
1285 int num10 = WorldGen.KillTile_GetTileDustAmount(true, tileSafely);
1286 for (int k = 0; k < num10; k++)
1287 {
1288 Dust dust = Main.dust[WorldGen.KillTile_MakeTileDust(i, j, tileSafely)];
1289 dust.velocity.Y = dust.velocity.Y - (3f + (float)num9 * 1.5f);
1290 dust.velocity.Y = dust.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1291 dust.velocity.Y = dust.velocity.Y * 0.75f;
1292 dust.scale += (float)num9 * 0.03f;
1293 }
1294 if (num9 >= 2)
1295 {
1296 for (int l = 0; l < num10 - 1; l++)
1297 {
1298 Dust dust2 = Main.dust[WorldGen.KillTile_MakeTileDust(i, j, tileSafely)];
1299 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y - (1f + (float)num9);
1300 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1301 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y * 0.75f;
1302 }
1303 }
1304 if (num10 > 0 && Main.rand.Next(2) != 0)
1305 {
1306 float num11 = (float)Math.Abs(num3 - i) / (num8 / 2f);
1307 Gore gore = Gore.NewGoreDirect(positionInWorld, Vector2.Zero, 61 + Main.rand.Next(3), 1f - (float)num9 * 0.15f + num11 * 0.5f);
1308 Gore gore2 = gore;
1309 gore2.velocity.Y = gore2.velocity.Y - (0.1f + (float)num9 * 0.5f + num11 * (float)num9 * 1f);
1310 Gore gore3 = gore;
1311 gore3.velocity.Y = gore3.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1312 Gore gore4 = gore;
1313 gore4.velocity.Y = gore4.velocity.Y * num;
1314 gore.position = new Vector2((float)(i * 16) + 20f * num, (float)(j * 16));
1315 PrettySparkleParticle prettySparkleParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolPrettySparkle.RequestParticle();
1316 int num12 = Main.rand.Next(20, 40);
1317 prettySparkleParticle.ColorTint = Main.hslToRgb(num5, 1f, 0.5f, 0);
1318 prettySparkleParticle.LocalPosition = gore.position;
1319 prettySparkleParticle.Rotation = 1.5707964f;
1320 prettySparkleParticle.Scale = new Vector2(num6 + Main.rand.NextFloat() * num7, 0.7f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.7f);
1321 prettySparkleParticle.Velocity = new Vector2(0f, -2f * num);
1322 prettySparkleParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.1f;
1323 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.95f;
1324 prettySparkleParticle.TimeToLive = (float)num12;
1325 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutEnd = (float)num12;
1326 prettySparkleParticle.FadeInEnd = (float)(num12 / 2);
1327 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutStart = (float)(num12 / 2);
1328 prettySparkleParticle.AdditiveAmount = 0.35f;
1329 prettySparkleParticle.DrawVerticalAxis = false;
1330 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(prettySparkleParticle);
1331 }
1332 }
1333 }
1334 }
1335 }
1336 }
1337 }
1338 if (flag)
1339 {
1340 SoundEngine.PlaySound(SoundID.DeadCellsFlintRelease, positionInWorld, 0f, 1f);
1341 for (int m = 0; m < 30; m++)
1342 {
1343 Vector2 vector = Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(5f, 3f);
1344 if (vector.Y > 0f)
1345 {
1346 vector.Y *= -1f;
1347 }
1348 Dust.NewDustPerfect(positionInWorld + Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(7f, 0f), 228, new Vector2?(vector), 0, default(Color), 0.7f + 0.8f * Main.rand.NextFloat());
1349 }
1350 SoundEngine.PlayTrackedSound(SoundID.DD2_MonkStaffGroundImpact, positionInWorld, default(SoundPlayOverrides));
1351 }
1352 }

1379 // Token: 0x06003110 RID: 12560 RVA: 0x005C2588 File Offset: 0x005C0788
1380 private static void Spawn_DeadCellsHeadEffect(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
1381 {
1382 Asset<Texture2D> asset = TextureAssets.Extra[266];
1383 if (!asset.IsLoaded)
1384 {
1385 return;
1386 }
1387 Player player = Main.player[(int)settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis];
1388 if (!player.active)
1389 {
1390 return;
1391 }
1392 Vector2 vector = settings.MovementVector;
1393 vector += new Vector2(0f, 0f);
1394 for (float num = 0f; num < 1f; num += 0.5f)
1395 {
1396 float num2 = 0.5f * Utils.Remap(settings.MovementVector.Length(), 0f, 10f, 0.5f, 1f, true);
1397 float num3 = 1f;
1398 float num4 = 15f;
1399 float num5 = 6.2831855f * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1400 Vector2 vector2 = Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(4f, 4f) * num2;

1402 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.SetBasicInfo(asset, null, Vector2.Zero, Vector2.Zero);
1403 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.SetTypeInfo(num4, player, player.cHead, false);
1404 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.Velocity = vector * 0.5f;
1405 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.AccelerationPerFrame = fadingPlayerShaderParticle.Velocity * -(-1f / num4) * 0.25f;
1406 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.LocalPosition = settings.PositionInWorld + num5.ToRotationVector2() * num3 * num2 * num4 * 0.5f + vector2 + vector * num;
1407 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.LocalPosition += fadingPlayerShaderParticle.Velocity * -0.5f;
1408 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.Rotation = vector.ToRotation() + 1.5707964f;
1409 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.01f;
1410 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.1f;
1411 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.Scale = new Vector2(0.6f, 1.2f) * num2;
1412 fadingPlayerShaderParticle.ScaleVelocity = fadingPlayerShaderParticle.Scale * (-1f / num4);
1413 Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Add(fadingPlayerShaderParticle);

1417 // Token: 0x06003111 RID: 12561 RVA: 0x005C27B4 File Offset: 0x005C09B4
1418 private static void Spawn_UFOLaser(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
1419 {
1420 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnInLine(settings, delegate(Vector2 dustPos, Vector2 velocity)
1421 {
1422 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos, (Main.rand.Next(2) == 0) ? Color.LimeGreen : Color.CornflowerBlue);
1423 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos - velocity * 0.25f, (Main.rand.Next(2) == 0) ? Color.LimeGreen : Color.CornflowerBlue);
1424 });
1425 }
1426

1431 {
1432 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos, default(Color));
1433 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos - velocity * 0.25f, default(Color));
1434 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos - velocity * 0.5f, default(Color));
1435 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos - velocity * 0.75f, default(Color));

1437 }

1446 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(162, dustPos - velocity * 0.5f, default(Color));

1451 // Token: 0x06003114 RID: 12564 RVA: 0x005C282C File Offset: 0x005C0A2C
1452 private static void Spawn_Shadowbeam(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings, bool hostile = true)
1453 {
1454 float velocityScalar = 0.25f;
1455 if (hostile)
1456 {
1457 velocityScalar = 0.03334f;
1458 }
1459 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnInLine(settings, delegate(Vector2 dustPos, Vector2 velocity)
1460 {
1461 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(173, dustPos, default(Color));
1462 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(173, dustPos - velocity * velocityScalar, default(Color));
1463 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(173, dustPos - velocity * velocityScalar * 2f, default(Color));
1464 });
1465 }
1466
1467 // Token: 0x06003115 RID: 12565 RVA: 0x005C286C File Offset: 0x005C0A6C
1468 private static void SpawnHelper_SpawnInLine(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings, Action<Vector2, Vector2> effectsPerStep = null)
1469 {
1470 if (effectsPerStep == null)
1471 {
1472 return;
1473 }
1474 Vector2 positionInWorld = settings.PositionInWorld;
1475 Vector2 movementVector = settings.MovementVector;
1476 Vector2 vector = (positionInWorld - movementVector).SafeNormalize(Vector2.Zero) * ((float)settings.UniqueInfoPiece / 1000f);
1477 float num = (positionInWorld - movementVector).Length();
1478 float num2 = vector.Length();
1479 if (num2 < 4f)
1480 {
1481 num2 = 4f;
1482 }
1483 for (float num3 = 0f; num3 < num; num3 += num2)
1484 {
1485 float num4 = num3 / num;
1486 Vector2 vector2 = Vector2.Lerp(movementVector, positionInWorld, num4);
1487 effectsPerStep(vector2, vector);
1488 }
1489 }
1490
1491 // Token: 0x06003116 RID: 12566 RVA: 0x005C290C File Offset: 0x005C0B0C
1492 private static void SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(int dustId, Vector2 dustPos, Color color = default(Color))
1493 {
1494 Dust dust = Main.dust[Dust.NewDust(dustPos, 1, 1, dustId, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1f)];
1495 dust.position = dustPos;
1496 dust.scale = (float)Main.rand.Next(70, 110) * 0.013f;
1497 dust.velocity *= 0.2f;
1498 if (color != default(Color))
1499 {
1500 dust.color = color;
1501 }
1502 }
1503
1504 // Token: 0x06003117 RID: 12567 RVA: 0x005C2994 File Offset: 0x005C0B94

1514 {

1529 prettySparkleParticle.Velocity = vector * 0.05f;

1552 prettySparkleParticle2.FadeOutStart = num / 2f;

1556 if (num5 == 1f)

1559 prettySparkleParticle2.Velocity *= 1.5f;

1561 }

1564 {
1565 Dust dust = Dust.NewDustPerfect(settings.PositionInWorld, 6, new Vector2?(vector2.RotatedBy((double)(Main.rand.NextFloatDirection() * 6.2831855f * 0.025f), default(Vector2)) * Main.rand.NextFloat()), 0, default(Color), 1f);

1567 dust.scale = 1.4f;

1570 dust2.scale = 1.4f;

1577 {
1578 int num8 = j % 2;

1597 // Token: 0x06003118 RID: 12568 RVA: 0x005C3034 File Offset: 0x005C1234
1598 private static void Spawn_DeadCellsDownDashExplosion(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
1599 {
1600 Vector2 positionInWorld = settings.PositionInWorld;
1601 SoundEngine.PlayTrackedSound(SoundID.DD2_MonkStaffGroundImpact, positionInWorld, default(SoundPlayOverrides));
1602 float x = settings.MovementVector.X;
1603 Point point = (positionInWorld + new Vector2(-x, -160f)).ToTileCoordinates();
1604 Point point2 = (positionInWorld + new Vector2(x, 160f)).ToTileCoordinates();
1605 int num = point.X / 2 + point2.X / 2;
1606 int num2 = (int)x / 2;
1607 bool flag = settings.UniqueInfoPiece == 1;
1608 float num3 = (flag ? 0.01f : 0.55f);
1609 float num4 = (flag ? 2f : 1f);
1610 float num5 = (flag ? 3f : 2f);
1611 for (int i = 0; i < 40; i++)
1612 {
1613 Vector2 vector = Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(5f, 3f);
1614 if (vector.Y > 0f)
1615 {
1616 vector.Y *= -1f;
1617 }
1618 if (flag)
1619 {
1620 vector *= 1.5f;
1621 }
1622 Dust dust = Dust.CloneDust(Dust.NewDustPerfect(positionInWorld + Main.rand.NextVector2Circular(10f, 0f), 306, new Vector2?(vector), 0, Main.hslToRgb(num3, 1f, 0.5f, byte.MaxValue), 1.9f + 0.8f * Main.rand.NextFloat()));
1623 dust.scale -= 0.6f;
1624 dust.color = Color.White;
1625 }
1626 float num6 = 40f;
1627 int num7 = 3;
1628 for (int j = point.X; j <= point2.X; j++)
1629 {
1630 for (int k = point.Y; k <= point2.Y; k++)
1631 {
1632 if (Vector2.Distance(positionInWorld, new Vector2((float)(j * 16), (float)(k * 16))) <= (float)num2)
1633 {
1634 Tile tileSafely = Framing.GetTileSafely(j, k);
1635 if (tileSafely.active() && Main.tileSolid[(int)tileSafely.type] && (!Main.tileSolidTop[(int)tileSafely.type] || tileSafely.frameY == 0) && (!Main.tileFrameImportant[(int)tileSafely.type] || Main.tileSolidTop[(int)tileSafely.type]))
1636 {
1637 Tile tileSafely2 = Framing.GetTileSafely(j, k - 1);
1638 if (!tileSafely2.active() || !Main.tileSolid[(int)tileSafely2.type] || Main.tileSolidTop[(int)tileSafely2.type])
1639 {
1640 int num8 = WorldGen.KillTile_GetTileDustAmount(true, tileSafely);
1641 for (int l = 0; l < num8; l++)
1642 {
1643 Dust dust2 = Main.dust[WorldGen.KillTile_MakeTileDust(j, k, tileSafely)];
1644 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y - (3f + (float)num7 * 1.5f);
1645 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1646 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y * 0.75f;
1647 dust2.scale += (float)num7 * 0.03f;
1648 }
1649 if (num7 >= 2)
1650 {
1651 for (int m = 0; m < num8 - 1; m++)
1652 {
1653 Dust dust3 = Main.dust[WorldGen.KillTile_MakeTileDust(j, k, tileSafely)];
1654 dust3.velocity.Y = dust3.velocity.Y - (1f + (float)num7);
1655 dust3.velocity.Y = dust3.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1656 dust3.velocity.Y = dust3.velocity.Y * 0.75f;
1657 }
1658 }
1659 if (num8 > 0 && Main.rand.Next(3) != 0)
1660 {
1661 float num9 = (float)Math.Abs(num - j) / (num6 / 2f);
1662 Gore gore = Gore.NewGoreDirect(positionInWorld, Vector2.Zero, 61 + Main.rand.Next(3), 1f - (float)num7 * 0.15f + num9 * 0.5f);
1663 Gore gore2 = gore;
1664 gore2.velocity.Y = gore2.velocity.Y - (0.1f + (float)num7 * 0.5f + num9 * (float)num7 * 1f);
1665 Gore gore3 = gore;
1666 gore3.velocity.Y = gore3.velocity.Y * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1667 gore.position = new Vector2((float)(j * 16 + 20), (float)(k * 16));
1668 PrettySparkleParticle prettySparkleParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolPrettySparkle.RequestParticle();
1669 int num10 = Main.rand.Next(20, 40);
1670 prettySparkleParticle.ColorTint = Main.hslToRgb(num3 + 0.1f * Main.rand.NextFloat(), 1f, 0.5f, 0);
1671 prettySparkleParticle.LocalPosition = gore.position;
1672 prettySparkleParticle.Rotation = 1.5707964f;
1673 prettySparkleParticle.Scale = new Vector2(num4 + Main.rand.NextFloat() * num5, 0.7f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.7f);
1674 prettySparkleParticle.Velocity = new Vector2(0f, -2f);
1675 prettySparkleParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 0.1f;
1676 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.95f;
1677 prettySparkleParticle.TimeToLive = (float)num10;
1678 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutEnd = (float)num10;
1679 prettySparkleParticle.FadeInEnd = (float)(num10 / 2);
1680 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutStart = (float)(num10 / 2);
1681 prettySparkleParticle.AdditiveAmount = 0.35f;
1682 prettySparkleParticle.DrawVerticalAxis = false;
1683 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(prettySparkleParticle);
1684 }
1685 }
1686 }
1687 }
1688 }
1689 }
1690 }

1721 prettySparkleParticle2.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.95f;

1725 prettySparkleParticle2.FadeOutStart = (float)(num2 / 2);
1726 prettySparkleParticle2.AdditiveAmount = 1f;
1727 prettySparkleParticle2.DrawVerticalAxis = false;

1771 {
1772 int num3 = Dust.NewDust(rectangle.TopLeft(), rectangle.Width, rectangle.Height, 308, 0f, 0f, 0, default(Color), 1f);
1773 Dust dust = Main.dust[num3];

1775 Dust dust2 = Main.dust[num3];
1776 dust2.velocity.X = dust2.velocity.X * 0.5f;
1777 Main.dust[num3].scale = 0.8f;
1778 Main.dust[num3].noGravity = true;

1780 if (num4 == 0)
1781 {
1782 Main.dust[num3].color = new Color(255, 255, 210);
1783 }
1784 else if (num4 == 1)
1785 {
1786 Main.dust[num3].color = new Color(190, 245, 255);
1787 }
1788 else if (num4 == 2)
1789 {
1790 Main.dust[num3].color = new Color(255, 150, 255);
1791 }
1792 else
1793 {
1794 Main.dust[num3].color = new Color(190, 175, 255);
1795 }
1796 }
1797 SoundEngine.PlaySound(SoundID.Item29, settings.PositionInWorld, 0f, 1f);

1800 // Token: 0x0600311B RID: 12571 RVA: 0x005C3B24 File Offset: 0x005C1D24
1801 private static void Spawn_PooFly(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
1802 {

1805 {
1806 return;

1808 LittleFlyingCritterParticle littleFlyingCritterParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolFlies.RequestParticle();

1813 // Token: 0x0600311C RID: 12572 RVA: 0x005C3B9C File Offset: 0x005C1D9C
1814 private static void Spawn_Digestion(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)

1820 {
1821 int num3 = Dust.NewDust(positionInWorld + Vector2.UnitX * (float)(-(float)num) * 8f - Vector2.One * 5f + Vector2.UnitY * 8f, 3, 6, 216, (float)(-(float)num), 1f, 0, default(Color), 1f);

1823 Main.dust[num3].scale = 0.8f;
1824 }
1825 if (Main.rand.Next(30) == 0)
1826 {
1827 int num4 = Gore.NewGore(positionInWorld + Vector2.UnitX * (float)(-(float)num) * 8f, Vector2.Zero, Main.rand.Next(580, 583), 1f);

1829 Main.gore[num4].velocity.Y = Math.Abs(Main.gore[num4].velocity.Y);
1830 Main.gore[num4].velocity.X = -Math.Abs(Main.gore[num4].velocity.X) * (float)num;
1831 }

1858 private static void Spawn_LoadOutChange(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
1859 {

1862 {
1863 return;
1864 }

1866 int num = 6;
1867 hitbox.Height -= num;
1868 if (player.gravDir == 1f)
1869 {
1870 hitbox.Y += num;
1871 }
1872 for (int i = 0; i < 40; i++)
1873 {

1876 dust.velocity += player.velocity * 2f * Main.rand.NextFloat();
1877 dust.noGravity = true;
1878 dust.noLight = (dust.noLightEmittance = true);
1879 }
1880 for (int j = 0; j < 5; j++)
1881 {
1882 Dust dust2 = Dust.NewDustPerfect(Main.rand.NextVector2FromRectangle(hitbox), 43, null, 254, Main.hslToRgb(Main.rand.NextFloat(), 0.3f, 0.8f, byte.MaxValue), Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.8f + 0.8f);
1883 dust2.velocity = new Vector2(0f, (float)(-(float)hitbox.Height) * Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.04f).RotatedBy((double)(Main.rand.NextFloatDirection() * 6.2831855f * 0.1f), default(Vector2));

1890 // Token: 0x0600311F RID: 12575 RVA: 0x005C40AC File Offset: 0x005C22AC
1891 private static void Spawn_TownSlimeTransform(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
1892 {

1894 {
1895 case 0:
1896 ParticleOrchestrator.NerdySlimeEffect(settings);
1897 return;
1898 case 1:
1899 ParticleOrchestrator.CopperSlimeEffect(settings);
1900 return;
1901 case 2:
1902 ParticleOrchestrator.ElderSlimeEffect(settings);
1903 return;
1904 default:
1905 return;

2171 // Token: 0x06003127 RID: 12583 RVA: 0x005C50C4 File Offset: 0x005C32C4
2172 private static void Spawn_ItemTransfer(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
2173 {
2174 Vector2 positionInWorld = settings.PositionInWorld;
2175 Vector2 vector = settings.PositionInWorld + settings.MovementVector;
2176 int num = settings.UniqueInfoPiece & 16777215;
2177 BitsByte bitsByte = (byte)(settings.UniqueInfoPiece >> 24);
2178 bool flag = bitsByte[0];
2179 bool flag2 = bitsByte[1];
2180 bool flag3 = bitsByte[2];
2181 bool flag4 = bitsByte[3];
2182 Item item;
2183 if (!ContentSamples.ItemsByType.TryGetValue(num, out item))
2184 {
2185 return;
2186 }
2187 if (item.IsAir)
2188 {
2189 return;
2190 }
2191 num = item.type;
2192 int num2 = Main.rand.Next(60, 80);
2193 Chest.AskForChestToEatItem(vector + new Vector2(-8f, -8f), num2 + 10);
2194 Vector2 vector2 = Main.rand.NextVector2Square(-1f, 1f);
2195 ItemTransferParticle itemTransferParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolItemTransfer.RequestParticle();
2196 itemTransferParticle.Prepare(num, num2, positionInWorld, vector, flag ? (vector2 * 24f) : Vector2.Zero, flag2 ? (vector2 * 8f) : Vector2.Zero, flag3, flag4, false, 1);
2197 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(itemTransferParticle);
2198 }
2199

2207 gore.alpha = 100;
2208 gore.velocity = (6.2831855f * (float)Main.rand.Next()).ToRotationVector2() * Main.rand.NextFloat() + settings.MovementVector * 0.5f;
2209 }

2371 // Token: 0x0600312D RID: 12589 RVA: 0x005C5BBC File Offset: 0x005C3DBC
2372 private static void Spawn_PlayerVoiceOverrideSound(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
2373 {
2374 byte indexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis = settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis;
2375 if (indexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis < 0 || indexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis >= 255)
2376 {
2377 return;
2378 }
2379 Player player = Main.player[(int)settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis];
2380 if (!player.active || player.dead)
2381 {
2382 return;
2383 }
2384 sbyte b = (sbyte)settings.UniqueInfoPiece;
2385 sbyte voiceOverride = player.voiceOverride;
2386 player.voiceOverride = b;
2387 player.PlayHurtSound();
2388 player.voiceOverride = voiceOverride;
2389 }
2390

2436 int num = 12;

2438 float num3 = 5f;

2445 {
2446 Vector2 vector = movementVector + new Vector2(num3 + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 1f, 0f).RotatedBy((double)((float)i / (float)num * 6.2831855f), Vector2.Zero);
2447 vector = vector.RotatedByRandom((double)num5);
2448 GasParticle gasParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolGas.RequestParticle();
2449 gasParticle.AccelerationPerFrame = Vector2.Zero;
2450 gasParticle.Velocity = vector;

2455 gasParticle.InitialScale = 1f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.35f;
2456 Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Add(gasParticle);
2457 }
2458 for (int j = 0; j < num2; j++)
2459 {
2460 Vector2 vector2 = new Vector2(num4 + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 1.45f, 0f).RotatedBy((double)((float)j / (float)num2 * 6.2831855f), Vector2.Zero);
2461 vector2 = vector2.RotatedByRandom((double)num6);
2462 if (j % 2 == 0)
2463 {
2464 vector2 *= 0.5f;
2465 }
2466 GasParticle gasParticle2 = ParticleOrchestrator._poolGas.RequestParticle();
2467 gasParticle2.AccelerationPerFrame = Vector2.Zero;
2468 gasParticle2.Velocity = vector2;
2469 gasParticle2.ColorTint = Color.White;
2470 gasParticle2.LightColorTint = color;
2471 gasParticle2.LocalPosition = positionInWorld;
2472 gasParticle2.TimeToLive = (float)(80 + Main.rand.Next(30));
2473 gasParticle2.InitialScale = 1f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.5f;
2474 Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Add(gasParticle2);

2635 prettySparkleParticle.Velocity = Vector2.Zero;
2636 prettySparkleParticle.DrawVerticalAxis = false;
2637 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(prettySparkleParticle);

2641 // Token: 0x06003135 RID: 12597 RVA: 0x005C68CC File Offset: 0x005C4ACC
2642 private static void Spawn_LeafCrystalShot(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
2643 {
2644 int num = 30;
2645 PrettySparkleParticle prettySparkleParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolPrettySparkle.RequestParticle();
2646 Vector2 movementVector = settings.MovementVector;
2647 Color color = Main.hslToRgb((float)settings.UniqueInfoPiece / 255f, 1f, 0.5f, byte.MaxValue);
2648 color = Color.Lerp(color, Color.Gold, (float)color.R / 255f * 0.5f);
2649 prettySparkleParticle.ColorTint = color;
2650 prettySparkleParticle.LocalPosition = settings.PositionInWorld;
2651 prettySparkleParticle.Rotation = movementVector.ToRotation();
2652 prettySparkleParticle.Scale = new Vector2(4f, 1f) * 1f;
2653 prettySparkleParticle.FadeInNormalizedTime = 5E-06f;
2654 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 1f;
2655 prettySparkleParticle.TimeToLive = (float)num;
2656 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutEnd = (float)num;
2657 prettySparkleParticle.FadeInEnd = (float)(num / 2);
2658 prettySparkleParticle.FadeOutStart = (float)(num / 2);
2659 prettySparkleParticle.AdditiveAmount = 0.5f;
2660 prettySparkleParticle.Velocity = settings.MovementVector;
2661 prettySparkleParticle.LocalPosition -= prettySparkleParticle.Velocity * 4f;
2662 prettySparkleParticle.DrawVerticalAxis = false;
2663 Lighting.AddLight(settings.PositionInWorld, new Vector3(0.05f, 0.2f, 0.1f) * 1.5f);
2664 Main.ParticleSystem_World_OverPlayers.Add(prettySparkleParticle);
2665 }

3022 Main.dust[num8].fadeIn = 0.7f + Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.8f;
3023 if (num8 != 6000)
3024 {
3025 Dust dust = Dust.CloneDust(num8);
3026 dust.scale /= 2f;
3027 dust.fadeIn *= 0.75f;
3028 dust.color = new Color(255, 255, 255, 255);
3029 }
3030 }
3031 }

3315 // Token: 0x06003144 RID: 12612 RVA: 0x005C92B4 File Offset: 0x005C74B4
3316 private static void Spawn_FlameWaders(ParticleOrchestraSettings settings)
3317 {
3318 float num = 60f;
3319 for (int i = -1; i <= 1; i++)
3320 {
3321 int num2 = (int)Main.rand.NextFromList(new short[] { 326, 327, 328 });
3322 Main.instance.LoadProjectile(num2);
3323 Player player = Main.player[(int)settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis];
3324 float num3 = Main.rand.NextFloat() * 0.9f + 0.1f;
3325 Vector2 vector = settings.PositionInWorld + new Vector2((float)i * 5.3333335f, 0f);
3326 FlameParticle flameParticle = ParticleOrchestrator._poolFlame.RequestParticle();
3327 flameParticle.SetBasicInfo(TextureAssets.Projectile[num2], null, Vector2.Zero, vector);
3328 flameParticle.SetTypeInfo(num, (int)settings.IndexOfPlayerWhoInvokedThis, player.cFlameWaker);
3329 flameParticle.FadeOutNormalizedTime = 0.4f;
3330 flameParticle.ScaleAcceleration = Vector2.One * num3 * -0.016666668f / num;
3331 flameParticle.Scale = Vector2.One * num3;
3332 Main.ParticleSystem_World_BehindPlayers.Add(flameParticle);
3333 if (Main.rand.Next(16) == 0)
3334 {
3335 Dust dust = Dust.NewDustDirect(vector, 4, 4, 6, 0f, 0f, 100, default(Color), 1f);
3336 if (Main.rand.Next(2) == 0)
3337 {
3338 dust.noGravity = true;
3339 dust.fadeIn = 1.15f;
3340 }
3341 else
3342 {
3343 dust.scale = 0.6f;
3344 }
3345 dust.velocity *= 0.6f;
3346 Dust dust2 = dust;
3347 dust2.velocity.Y = dust2.velocity.Y - 1.2f;
3348 dust.noLight = true;
3349 Dust dust3 = dust;
3350 dust3.position.Y = dust3.position.Y - 4f;
3351 dust.shader = GameShaders.Armor.GetSecondaryShader(player.cFlameWaker, player);
3352 }
3353 }
3354 }

3533 internal void <Spawn_UFOLaser>b__55_0(Vector2 dustPos, Vector2 velocity)
3534 {
3535 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos, (Main.rand.Next(2) == 0) ? Color.LimeGreen : Color.CornflowerBlue);
3536 ParticleOrchestrator.SpawnHelper_SpawnSingleLineDust(160, dustPos - velocity * 0.25f, (Main.rand.Next(2) == 0) ? Color.LimeGreen : Color.CornflowerBlue);
3537 }
3538
